message:
fix(viewer): prevent duplicate keyboard shortcut listeners on graph reinit

- Track keyboard shortcut handler in module-level variable and guard
  setupKeyboardShortcuts() against double-registration
- Clean up keydown listener in cleanup() to prevent leaked event handlers
  when the graph runtime is reinitialized
- Add test asserting the stable handler pattern exists in graph.js
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
